per_turn_leaks.student_message: When you have those episodes, do you notice anything else happening to your body?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yeah... when I get these really bad coughing fits, I sometimes feel a little lightheaded or dizzy, but that usually goes away once I sit back and try to calm down. And just lately, I've been getting this low-grade fever, like 38-point-something degrees, that comes on in the evenings and sticks around until morning.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Any sweating or clamminess when the symptoms hit?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Actually, yeah... I have noticed some night sweats lately. It's really weird because I'm not usually a hot sleeper, but for the past few nights, I've woken up drenched in sweat and my pajamas are always soaked by morning.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Have you had any fevers, chills, or night sweats?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yes, like I mentioned earlier, I've been getting this low-grade fever that comes on in the evenings and sticks around until morning. And yeah, I have been having these really bad night sweats lately, where I wake up drenched in sweat and my pajamas are soaked by morning. It's really weird because I'm not usually a hot sleeper.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Have you noticed any changes in your appetite or weight?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I've definitely been feeling less hungry than usual over the past few days, like I just don't have the energy to eat much. And to be honest, I think I might have lost a bit of weight since this all started - my clothes feel looser on me, but it's hard for me to tell for sure because I haven't been weighing myself regularly.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Any medical problems in your family? Parents, siblings?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yeah, my mom actually has asthma, so I've grown up seeing her deal with respiratory issues. But aside from that, no major medical problems on either side of my family that I know of. My grandmother did pass away from lung cancer when I was a kid, but that's about it.
